versions.version_description: Based on studio album. Standard chords used.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: We Could Belong To Each Other

recommended.version_description: This is his latest version which is tuned up a step.

content:
I Don’t have The Heart- James Ingram original key D
Tabbed By : Christian Estoesta
to: Wella Dawn Baloja   I cannot really Love you. 
Im sorry!so this song is for you

VErse 1:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Your face is beaming[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                      
You say it's case you're dreaming[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A#[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     
Of how good it's going to be[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
You say you've been around[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
And now you've finally found[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
everything you wanted and needed in me[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
I don't have the heart to hurt you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
It's the last thing I wanna do[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
But I don't have the heart to love you[/tab]
     Em               Em-G--        D
Not the way you want to me to

VErse 2:
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Inside I'm dying[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]      
Seeing you crying[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]A#[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
How can I make you understand[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
I care about you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
So much about you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]A[/ch]
 I'm trying to say this, as gently as I can[/tab]

(repeat chorus)

Verse 3:
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]
You're so trusting[/tab]

And open
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Hoping that love will start[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
But I don't have the heart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
Oh no, I don't have the heart[/tab]
(repeat chorus)
